Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze event log for anomalies

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1001 Standard sequence Create PR Approve PR Issue PO Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case All good

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1002 Sequence Create PR at 0830 Issue PO at 0840 before approval Then Vendor Invoice Received at 0700 next day Release Payment at 0715 same day Approve PR at 0800 after invoice and payment Receive Goods at 0900 next day Match Invoice to PO at next day Close Case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Anomalies Issue PO before approving PR

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Release payment occurs after vendor invoice received but before goods receipt and before match

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In this case vendor invoice received earlier than goods receipt So they paid before receiving goods Also release payment occurs before approval of purchase requisition Also match invoice to PO occurs after payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Also the order of events is out of order relative to typical process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1003 Sequence Create PR Approve Issue PO Release Payment on Feb8 then Vendor Invoice Received on Feb9 Receive Goods on Feb10 Match Invoice to PO on Feb11 Close Case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: They released payment before receiving the vendor invoice or goods or matching That is problematic

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Also the order of events is reversed relative to typical process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1004 Sequence seems fine except that Receive Goods occurs before Issue Purchase Order that is unusual because you normally issue a purchase order first then receive goods based on that order

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: But here they receive goods first then issue purchase order later same day maybe due to urgent need or mis ordering but still unusual

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case1001 has all steps in correct order

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case1002 missing Approve Purchase Requisition until after many steps anomaly as above

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case1003 has approve earlier yes correct but release payment too early

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case1004 Issue Purchase Order later than receive goods anomaly as above

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus we should produce answer summarizing anomalies per case with explanation for risk of fraud non compliance with internal controls risk of overpayment paying without verifying delivery or matching invoices and audit issues due to lack of proper approvals prior to issuing orders or payments

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Standard P2P best practices like three way match requirement PO GR INV must be done prior releasing payments

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: There is a possibility of time stamping errors or manual entry errors or system integration issues causing apparent out of order events
